Headline: #67 67th-69th-71st , #94 California Temporary Reroute at 69th/Bell
ShortDescription: 67 67th-69th-71st , 94 California buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, street blockage near 69th/Bell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#67 67th-69th-71st ,#94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 69th, Damen, 67th and Western including normal route streets due to street blockage at 69th/Bell.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Blue Line Service Delayed at Oak Park
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are standing at Oak Park due to an unauthorized person on the tracks. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are standing at Oak Park due to an unauthorized person on the tracks.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
